name: Digital Payments
description: Customer-facing payment authorization and settlement journey.
risk_appetite: No validated critical path may remain open longer than 7 days.
customer_impact: Payment outage or tampering affects revenue, trust, and regulatory reporting.
revenue_dependency: Direct revenue capture for online channels.
scope_reason: Highest revenue concentration and strongest attacker incentive.

name: Workforce Identity
description: SSO, privileged access, and identity governance for employees and contractors.
risk_appetite: Privileged identity exposure requires same-week validation and executive visibility.
customer_impact: Compromised identity can unlock lateral movement into customer data systems.
revenue_dependency: Indirect, but a failure enables enterprise-wide compromise.
scope_reason: Identity is the most reusable control plane for attackers.

name: Cloud Delivery Platform
description: CI/CD, container runtime, and production cloud landing zone.
risk_appetite: Internet-reachable build or cloud control-plane exposures require rapid containment.
customer_impact: Platform compromise can introduce malicious code or expose customer data.
scope_reason: Attack path bridge between engineering systems and production.

name: Public Marketing
description: Corporate website, campaign microsites, analytics tags, and brand presence.
risk_appetite: Defacement and tracking exposure are managed on standard change windows unless chained.
customer_impact: Brand trust and lead-generation impact, limited sensitive data processing.
scope_reason: Tracked, but not part of the first crown-jewel CTEM sprint.
